tasks.subject: Task 1: Rebuild route aggregation + template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /dashboard/recent-battles returns a band-rollup list and a top-10 list to the template; the template renders them in a two-column grid with overflow-safe tracks.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/routes/dashboard.py — dashboard_recent_battles function (~lines 2231–2252)
- Modify: app/templates/partials/dashboard_recent_battles.html — full rewrite

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Widget renders without horizontal overflow.
- Left rollup: one row per band with battles, sorted by total kills DESC, badge + system + matchup + (kills · isk) stat.
- Right top-10: ranked rows by kill_count DESC, badge + system + matchup + (kills · pilots) stat.
- Empty groups skipped; empty-state fallback works.
- Rows link to zKillboard, title tooltip carries full matchup.
- Stacks vertically below 900px.

**Verify:** Manual on production — spec §Testing.

**Steps:** Rewrite route → rewrite template → python3 ast check → grep sanity → commit → deploy → manual verify.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/routes/dashboard.py","app/templates/partials/dashboard_recent_battles.html"],"verifyCommand":"manual","acceptanceCriteria":["No horizontal overflow","Left rollup sorted by total kills DESC","Right top-10 sorted by kill_count DESC","Rows link to zKB with hover tooltip","Stacks below 900px"]}
```
